medialive.channel.embeddedsourcesettings:
Information about the embedded captions to extract from the input.

The parent of this entity is CaptionSelectorSettings.

medialive.channel.embeddedsourcesettings.Description: If this is upconvert, 608 data is both passed through the "608 compatibility bytes" fields of the 708 wrapper as well as translated into 708. If 708 data is present in the source content, it is discarded.
Set to "auto" to handle streams with intermittent or non-aligned SCTE-20 and embedded captions.
Specifies the 608/708 channel number within the video track from which to extract captions. This is unused for passthrough.
This field is unused and deprecated.
